FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Class FlyoutPositioner

Namespace
FluentGpu.Controls
Assembly
FluentGpu.Controls.dll

Pure placement math for an anchored flyout — a faithful port of WinUI's FlyoutBase::CalculatePlacementPrivate (FlyoutBase_Partial.cpp:2503-2659): try the requested major side, walk the per-side fallback order (Top:[T,B,L,R] / Bottom:[B,T,L,R] / Left:[L,R,T,B] / Right:[R,L,T,B], cpp:2559-2593), justify on the secondary axis and clamp both axes into the container (TryPlacement, cpp:415-483); when NOTHING fits, keep the first choice and resize along the major axis to the side with more space (ResizeToFit/SelectSideWithMoreSpace, cpp:2605-2614, 581-635); finally shift by FlyoutMargin away from the anchor (cpp:2622-2646) and, for non-windowed popups only, clamp the min edge to the container origin (cpp:2648-2653 — windowed popups may go negative, i.e. above/left of the window).

public static class FlyoutPositioner
Inheritance
object
FlyoutPositioner
Inherited Members
object.Equals(object)

object.ToString()

Fields

FlyoutMargin

Margin between the flyout and its placement target / the window edge — WinUI FlyoutBase::FlyoutMargin = 4 (FlyoutBase_Partial.cpp:65). Attached/stretch dropdowns stay flush (0).

public const float FlyoutMargin = 4

Field Value

float

Methods

Place(in RectF, in Size2, in RectF, FlyoutPlacement, bool)

Container-rect placement. container is the collision box in the SAME coordinate space as anchor — the viewport rect for constrained popups, the monitor WORK AREA (translated into window space) for windowed out-of-bounds popups (FlyoutBase_Partial.cpp:3382-3392 useMonitorBounds). isWindowed skips the final min-edge clamp (cpp:2648-2653) so a windowed popup may extend above/left of the window.

public static PopupPlacementResult Place(in RectF anchor, in Size2 popup, in RectF container, FlyoutPlacement placement, bool isWindowed)

Parameters

anchor RectF
popup Size2
container RectF
placement FlyoutPlacement
isWindowed bool

Returns

PopupPlacementResult

Place(in RectF, in Size2, in Size2, FlyoutPlacement)

Viewport-constrained placement (the container is the window's DIP rect at origin).

public static PopupPlacementResult Place(in RectF anchor, in Size2 popup, in Size2 viewport, FlyoutPlacement placement)

Parameters

anchor RectF
popup Size2
viewport Size2
placement FlyoutPlacement

Returns

PopupPlacementResult
FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
